output: Executed batch 4 task T4. task_updates.executor_notes: Added non-inpainting mode coverage to `useInpainting.test.ts` for `reposition`, `img2img`, and `upscale`; added a new `useImageEditOrchestrator.test.ts` that proves the hook returns and builds with persisted edit modes instead of the inpainting hook's mode; extended `useInlineEditState.test.ts` to verify reposition is passed through to `useInpainting` and `imageEditValue.setEditMode('img2img')` calls persistence directly; and removed the `magic-edit as any` fixture from `buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts`. Verified with targeted Vitest runs (4 files, 23 tests passed) and `npx tsc --noEmit`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the new `useInpainting` tests cover `reposition`/`img2img`/`upscale` with empty brush strokes and pass-through editMode assertions, the new orchestrator test asserts `editMode === 'reposition'` instead of falling back to `'text'`, and `magic-edit as any` is removed from `buildImageEditStateValue.test.ts`.
